title: EU faces Turkey test over maritime territory grab
summary_full: If Turkey passes the legislation then 'the EU will have no alternative but to impose sanctions' and provide Greece with military support, said Greek MEP Nikolas Farantouris
summary_public: If Turkey passes the legislation then 'the EU will have no alternative but to impose sanctions' and provide Greece with military support, said Greek MEP Nikolas Farantouris
